meaning: To search very carefully and thoroughly; search everywhere / look intensely

meaning: Opinions or explanations about an event or situation - analysis / remarks / discussion

meaning: To do better than something or someone else - perform better than / exceed

meaning: Extremely fast and strong; rapid / explosive / very strong

meaning: Performing better than what financial analysts predicted; exceeding expectations / doing better than forecasts

meaning: Used to strongly emphasize that something truly exists or is true; truly has / definitely has

meaning: Able to be connected back to a particular cause or origin; linked back to / caused by
pinyin: Many health problems are traceable to stress.

character: are more than twice as likely to
meaning: Have a probability that is over two times higher; are much more likely to / have over double the chance to
pinyin: Smokers are more than twice as likely to develop lung disease.

character: more than four times as likely to
meaning: Have a probability that is over four times higher; have over four times the chance to

meaning: Show or emphasize that something is necessary; emphasize the importance of / show the need for

meaning: Specific efforts to increase understanding and take action toward a particular group or issue; focused education and actions / specific awareness campaigns and support measures

meaning: To deal directly with a difficult problem or situation; face / deal with directly

meaning: Much more likely than would normally be expected; far more likely than others / unevenly more likely to

meaning: Inside the household or family environment; at home / inside the household

meaning: Focused mainly on a particular thing; focused on / built around

meaning: Supported or formed the basis of something; supported / formed the foundation of

meaning: Respectful submission to another person‚Äôs wishes, opinions, or authority; respectful obedience / yielding out of respect

meaning: To hand something over or devote something completely to a particular purpose; surrender to / dedicate to

meaning: Used to express the basic or most important point of something; basically / fundamentally / at its core
pinyin: In essence, the argument is about freedom.
